2604.26880.title: HealthNLP_Retrievers at ArchEHR-QA 2026: Cascaded LLM Pipeline for Grounded Clinical Question Answering
2604.26880.paper_summary: Patient portals now give individuals direct access to their electronic health records (EHRs), yet access alone does not ensure patients understand or act on the complex clinical information contained in these records. The ArchEHR-QA 2026 shared task addresses this challenge by focusing on grounded question answering over EHRs, and this paper presents the system developed by the HealthNLP_Retrievers team for this task. The proposed approach uses a multi-stage cascaded pipeline powered by the Gemini 2.5 Pro large language model to interpret patient-authored questions and retrieve relevant evidence from lengthy clinical notes. Our architecture comprises four integrated modules: (1) a few-shot query reformulation unit which summarizes verbose patient queries; (2) a heuristic-based evidence scorer which ranks clinical sentences to prioritize recall; (3) a grounded response generator which synthesizes professional-caliber answers restricted strictly to identified evidence; and (4) a high-precision many-to-many alignment framework which links generated answers to supporting clinical sentences. This cascaded approach achieved competitive results. Across the individual tracks, the system ranked 1st in question interpretation, 5th in answer generation, 7th in evidence identification, and 9th in answer-evidence alignment. These results show that integrating large language models within a structured multi-stage pipeline improves grounding, precision, and the professional quality of patient-oriented health communication. To support reproducibility, our source code is publicly available in our GitHub repository
2604.26880.paper_summary_zh: 病人入口網站現在使個人能夠直接訪問他們的電子健康紀錄（EHRs），但僅有訪問權限並不保證病人能理解或採取行動於這些紀錄中包含的複雜臨床信息。ArchEHR-QA 2026共享任務針對這一挑戰，專注於基於EHR的有根問題回答，本文介紹了HealthNLP_Retrievers團隊為此任務開發的系統。所提出的方法使用由Gemini 2.5 Pro大型語言模型驅動的多階段級聯管道來解釋病人撰寫的問題並從冗長的臨床筆記中檢索相關證據。我們的架構包括四個集成模塊：（1）一個少量樣本查詢重構單元，用於總結冗長的病人查詢；（2）一個基於啟發式的證據評分器，對臨床句子進行排名以優先考慮召回；（3）一個有根的回答生成器，合成專業級的答案，嚴格限制於已識別的證據；以及（4）一個高精度的多對多對齊框架，將生成的答案與支持的臨床句子連接起來。這種級聯方法取得了競爭性的結果。在各個單獨的賽道中，該系統在問題解釋中排名第1，在答案生成中排名第5，在證據識別中排名第7，在答案與證據對齊中排名第9。這些結果顯示，將大型語言模型集成到結構化的多階段管道中可以改善基礎性、精確性以及以病人為導向的健康溝通的專業質量。為了支持可重複性，我們的源代碼已在我們的GitHub存儲庫中公開。
2604.26880.author: Md Biplob Hosen et.al.
2604.26880.authors: Md Biplob Hosen, Md Alomgeer Hussein, Md Akmol Masud, Omar Faruque, Tera L Reynolds, Lujie Karen Chen
